case_title: ROBINSON, JACK vs. GAVIN, ROBERT T. JR. et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GAVIN, ROBERT T. JR.

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY RICHARD GRABSTEIN PRESENT WITH PLTF. ATNY ARTHUR LIPTON PRESENT WITH DEFT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMENT.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GAVIN, ROBERT T. JR.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT GAVIN, ROBERT T. JR. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
